heading: Appointment and compensation of employees by Secretaries for Senate Majority and Minority; gross compensation
label: 6152 Appointment and compensation of employees by Secretaries for Senate Majority and Minority; gross compensation
text: Effective , the Secretary for the Majority and the Secretary for the Minority are each authorized to appoint and fix the compensation of such employees as they deem appropriate: , That the gross compensation paid to such employees shall not exceed $143,200 each fiscal year for each Secretary.October 1, 1977Provided
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 61g–5 of this titleSection is from the Congressional Operations Appropriation Act, 1978, which is title I of the Legislative Branch Appropriation Act, 1978.

Increases in CompensationIncreases in compensation for Senate officers and employees under authority of Federal Pay Comparability Act of 1970 (), see Salary Directives of President pro tempore of the Senate, set out as notes under .Pub. L. 91–656section 4571 of this title
